root_text.an7.24:1.3: katame ca, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniyā dhammā?
root_text.an7.24:2.1: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na kammārāmā bhavissanti, na kammaratā, na kammārāmataṁ anuyuttā; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.24:3.1: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na bhassārāmā bhavissanti …pe…
root_text.an7.24:3.4: na pāpicchā bhavissanti na pāpikānaṁ icchānaṁ vasaṁ gatā …
root_text.an7.24:3.5: na pāpamittā bhavissanti na pāpasahāyā na pāpasampavaṅkā …
root_text.an7.24:3.6: na oramattakena visesādhigamena antarāvosānaṁ āpajjissanti; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.24:4.1: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti.

translation_text.an7.24:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you seven principles that prevent decline.
translation_text.an7.24:1.2: Listen and apply your mind well …
translation_text.an7.24:1.3: And what are the seven principles that prevent decline?
translation_text.an7.24:2.1: As long as the mendicants don’t relish work, loving it and liking to relish it, they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.24:3.1: As long as they don’t enjoy talk …
translation_text.an7.24:3.4: they don’t have corrupt wishes, falling under the sway of corrupt wishes …
translation_text.an7.24:3.5: they don’t have bad friends, companions, and associates …
translation_text.an7.24:3.6: they don’t stop half-way after achieving some trifling distinction, they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.24:4.1: As long as these seven principles that prevent decline last among the mendicants, and as long as the mendicants are seen following them, they can expect growth, not decline.”
